news.headline: Myriad Genetics to present at two healthcare investor conferences soon, updated information available.

news.summary: In Toronto on May 14, 2025, Profound Medical Corp. (TSX: PRN; NASDAQ: PROF) released the outcomes of its Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting, which occurred on the same day, saw a strong turnout with 20,587,011 common shares present, equivalent to 68.5% of the total common shares in circulation.
news.headline: Profound Medical AGM voting results: 20.5M common shares (68.5%) represented in person/proxy at meeting.
Presidio Property Trust initiates a reverse stock split.

news.summary: Shelton, Connecticut - May 14, 2025 - Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE: HUBB) disclosed that Bill Sperry, their Chief Financial Officer, is slated to participate in the Wolfe Global Transportation and Industrials Conference. The conference will be available for viewing through a webcast starting at 4:35 PM Eastern Time on Wednesday, May 21, 2025.
news.headline: Hubbell CFO to appear at investor conference on May 21 at 4:35 PM ET. Event webcasted. (100)

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in Miami Beach, Florida, Starwood Real Estate Income Trust, Inc. (SREIT), a non-listed REIT under the management of Starwood Capital Group, disclosed the appointment of Nora Creedon as a real estate investment executive. With almost twenty years of experience in REIT, Creedon's addition to SREIT's team marks a significant development in the company's strategic direction. This move demonstrates SREIT’s commitment to fostering expertise within the real estate investment sector.
news.headline: SREIT appoints Nora Creedon as CEO, a seasoned executive with 20 years of REIT experience.

news.summary: The teams from the United States and Canada have emerged victorious by providing the fastest flawless service experience during the Valvoline Inc.'s 31st annual Oilympics competition in LEXINGTON, Ky., on May 14, 2025. Valvoline Inc. (NYSE: VVV), renowned for its efficient and reliable preventive automotive maintenance services, revealed the winners for this year's event.
news.headline: Teams from Tennessee and Ontario won gold in Valvoline Inc.'s 31st Oilympics for quick service. May 14, 2025.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, NASA announced their participation in a media teleconference organized by Axiom Space. The event is scheduled for 10:30 a.m. EDT on Tuesday, May 20. The purpose of the teleconference is to delve into the upcoming launch of Axiom Mission 4 (Ax-4), which marks the fourth private astronaut mission to the International Space Station. The teleconference will involve key individuals from NASA and Axiom Space, providing insights into the mission's objectives and significance. This collaboration signifies a significant development in private space exploration ventures and highlights the continued partnership between governmental space agencies and private space companies.
news.headline: NASA will participate in a teleconference by Axiom Space on May 20 to discuss the launch of Ax-4, the fourth private astronaut mission to the ISS.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, Avient Corporation announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.27 per share on its common stock (NYSE: AVNT). This dividend will be paid on July 9, 2025.
news.headline: Avient Corp (NYSE: AVNT) to pay quarterly dividend of $0.27/share on July 9, 2025, as declared by the Board of Directors.

news.summary: In Boston on May 14, 2025, Manulife Investment Management (Manulife IM) appointed Brent McGowan as the Global Head and Chief Investment Officer of Agriculture. In his new role, McGowan will be responsible for overseeing the agriculture business, with a focus on driving growth and improving performance globally.
news.headline: Brent McGowan appointed as Global Head and CIO of Agriculture at Manulife IM. Focus on growth and performance.

news.summary: Red Cat Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: RCAT) released its Q1 financial results showing a revenue of $1.63 million, lower than analyst projections of $3.85 million. The company reported a loss of 27 cents per share for the quarter, missing the estimated eight cents per share loss. Red Cat is optimistic about its partnership with Palantir Technologies, expecting it to enhance efficiency and cut down costs in the future. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Red Cat Holdings Q1 revenue: $1.63M; EPS: -27 cents, missing estimates. Highlights Palantir partnership. Shares drop.
US Official: Trump is not going to Turkey to join Russia-Ukraine talks

news.summary: FibroBiologics, a biotech company, announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The company has 240+ patents for developing therapies using fibroblasts. They completed a master cell bank for future trials and opened a new lab in Houston. They made progress in neurodegenerative disease research, showing successful remyelination with fibroblasts in animal models. They also presented at conferences and filed a patent for improving mitochondrial performance with fibroblasts. Future plans include starting a clinical trial for a diabetic foot ulcer treatment, completing trials for the same by 2026, and working on an investigational therapy for degenerative disc disease. Additionally, preclinical studies for a psoriasis treatment are expected to be completed by the end of 2025.
news.headline: FibroBiologics reported Q1 2025 financial results, with 240+ patents. They opened a lab, advanced in neurodegenerative disease research, and have upcoming milestones like clinical trials.

news.summary: Crescent Capital BDC, Inc. reported its financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2025. The company's net investment income was $0.45 per share, with net income at $0.11 per share. The net asset value per share was $19.62 at the end of March 2025, down from $19.98 in December 2024. The company declared a second quarter cash dividend of $0.42 per share, with a special dividend of $0.05 per share. As of March 31, 2025, the company had investments in 191 portfolio companies with a total fair value of $1,620.7 million. The portfolio was primarily composed of senior secured first lien and unitranche first lien investments. At the end of March 2025, the company's total assets were $1,666.5 million, with total net assets at $727.1 million.
news.headline: Crescent Capital BDC, Inc. reports Q1 2025 earnings: net income $0.11/share, NAV $19.62, $0.42 dividend/share declared. Investments $1.62 billion.

news.summary: Corby Spirit and Wine Limited reported Q3 revenue of $48.0 million (-1% YoY) and FYTD March revenue of $174.8 million (+7%). Q3 Adjusted EBITDA was $11.7 million (-10%), while FYTD March Adjusted EBITDA stood at $48.4 million (+4%). Adjusted Net Earnings in Q3 were $4.5 million (-20%) and $23.2 million (+1%) for FYTD March. Corby closed FYTD March with a healthy balance sheet and Cash Flow from Operating Activities was $29.2 million. The dividend declared for Q2 is $0.23 per share. The company continues to outperform the Canadian spirits market and is monitoring potential import tariff changes with the US. Corby also represented international wine brands under a transition period after a recent sale. Management remains optimistic about executing strategic plans for future growth. For further details, the financial statements are available on the company's website.
news.headline: Corby Spirit and Wine Limited's Q3 FY25 revenue at $48.0M (-1% YoY), FYTD March revenue at $174.8M (+7%). Quarterly dividend of $0.23/share.

news.summary: In Exton, Pennsylvania, Innovative Solutions & Support, Inc. (Nasdaq: ISSC) disclosed its fiscal second quarter financial results for the period ending March 31, 2025. The highlights for the second quarter of 2025 include significant growth: net revenue surged to $21.9 million, marking a 104% increase from the previous year. Gross profit hit $11.3 million during this period. Innovative Solutions & Support is renowned for its cutting-edge avionic solutions tailored for commercial, business aviation, and military sectors.
news.headline: Innovative Solutions & Support reports Q2 2025 results: Net revenue $21.9 million (+104%), gross profit $11.3 million.

news.summary: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE), a top technology and data provider globally, shared that Jeffrey C. Sprecher, Chair and CEO, is set to speak at the Bernstein 41st Annual Strategic Decisions Conference. The talk is scheduled for Wednesday, May 28 at 2:30 p.m. ET. Interested parties can view the live session or its replay through a webcast accessible in the investor relations and media segment of ICE’s site at http://ir.theice.
news.headline: ICE CEO Sprecher to speak at Bernstein conf on May 28 at 2:30pm. Webcast available on ICE website.

news.summary: Memphis, Tennessee – On May 14, 2025, Varsity Spirit, a key division of Varsity Brands renowned for its expertise in cheerleading, dance team and band attire, camps, competitions, and yearbooks, has wrapped up the 2025 Summit Championship and Dance event. The prestigious competition showcased talents from participants worldwide across various categories. The event, a prominent fixture on the cheerleading and dance calendar, drew in record-breaking numbers of attendees and participants. Throughout the championship, competitors demonstrated exceptional skills and creativity, maintaining the event's reputation as a global hallmark for cheerleading and dance excellence.
news.headline: Varsity Spirit celebrates successful conclusion of 2025 Summit Championships with cheer and dance teams.

news.summary: In Grover Beach, California on May 14, 2025, Coastal Community Builders has revealed the official start of sales for Trinity, a Signature Series coastal project featuring only 23 luxurious homes in the coveted West End area of Grover Beach. These residences boast spectacular views and are part of a limited offering.
news.headline: Coastal Community Builders starts sales for Trinity, Grover Beach's West End with 23 luxury homes.

news.summary: The MTA is revamping its global hubs to better assist customers in the pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device industries during international events.
news.headline: MTA enhances global event operations for pharmaceutical industry with strategic regional hubs.

news.summary: Fortune Brands Innovations, Inc. based in Deerfield, Illinois, has appointed Brendan M. Foley as a Class III member of the Board of Directors, effective from July 1, 2025. Foley will serve for a term until the Company's 2026 annual meeting of shareholders. Fortune Brands is a prominent company listed on the NYSE under the code FBIN, specializing in home, security, and digital products. The company focuses on enhancing lives by creating safe and comfortable spaces. Foley, who is currently the Chairman and President, joins the board to contribute to the company’s strategic direction and growth.
news.headline: Fortune Brands appoints Brendan M. Foley to Board of Directors effective July 1, 2025, a Class III member for term until 2026.

news.summary: Beyond Oil has recently obtained C$2.166 million in proceeds through the exercise of 1,836,766 warrants.
news.headline: Clal Insurance purchases Beyond Oil's warrants, resulting in C$2.166M from 1,836,766 warrants exercised.

news.summary: The initiation of cost-saving measures is being carried out by Pliant in order to prepare for the smooth execution of late-stage clinical trials. These initiatives aim to streamline operations and optimize resources to meet the upcoming trial requirements efficiently.
news.headline: Pliant Therapeutics reduces workforce to focus on late-stage trials, aiming for cost savings.

news.summary: On May 12, 2025, San Jose-based Heritage Commerce Corp (NASDAQ: HTBK) disclosed that Kroll Bond Rating Agency, LLC ("KBRA") has upheld the Company's senior unsecured debt rating at BBB+, with subordinated debt at BBB, and short-term debt at K2. KBRA also confirmed A- deposit and senior unsecured debt ratings, along with a subordinated debt rating of BBB+, and short-term deposit and debt ratings of K2 for Heritage Bank of Commerce. On May 9, 2025, KBRA designated the outlook of long-term ratings for both the Company and the Bank as stable.
news.headline: KBRA affirms Heritage Commerce Corp's ratings: Company - senior debt BBB+, subordinated debt BBB, short-term debt K2; Bank - deposit A-, senior debt BBB+, subordinated debt BBB+. Stable outlooks for both on May 9, 2025.

news.summary: Planet Fitness Inc (NYSE: PLNT) saw a drop in premarket trading post announcing its first-quarter 2025 results. The gym franchise reported a year-on-year sales increase of 11.5% to $276.7 million, falling short of the projected $279.16 million. Within this, the franchise segment revenue rose 10.7% Y/Y, corporate stores grew 9.2% Y/Y, and equipment sales surged 28.7% Y/Y. System-wide same club sales went up by 6.1% Y/Y, amounting to $1.3 billion compared to $1.2 billion a year ago. At the end of Q1, they had 20.6 million members, up by approximately 900,000 from the end of 2024. The adjusted EPS was 59 cents, below the 62 cents estimated by analysts. Operating expenses also rose to $197.5 million.
news.headline: Planet Fitness reports Q1 2025 revenue of $276.7 million, missing estimates. 6.1% increase in same club sales. 20.6 mil members. EPS 59 cents vs 62 cents consensus.

news.summary: Trump's announcement of a US-China trade deal on WhiteHouse.gov triggered a rapid shift in the market. This one event led to one of the quickest bear markets in history followed by a swift rally towards all-time highs. The implications of this whirlwind are significant. The market's primary concern was not rate cuts, employment figures, or inflation, but rather tariffs, with a specific focus on two key players: China and the EU. China stands as the US's largest importer, while the EU is the second-largest purchaser of American products, particularly natural resources. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Trump's US-China trade deal announcement caused market turmoil. Markets hit fastest bear market plunge. Now rallying. China and EU key players. Market focused on tariffs. Most important news for market.

news.summary: U.S. stocks surged on Thursday following the signing of a trade agreement between the U.S. and the U.K. The S&P 500 rose by 1.3% to close at 5,700, driven by gains in technology stocks. The Russell 2000 outperformed, jumping 2.1% and fully recovering from losses due to tariff announcements. The U.S. slashed tariffs on UK-made vehicles from 25% to 10%, with a 100,000-vehicle quota for British carmakers. The UK, in return, reduced tariffs on American beef and agreed to purchase $10 billion worth of Boeing aircraft. Trump hinted at possible tax cuts and advised investors to buy stocks, predicting a strong economic growth. The president also mentioned potential tariff increases for nations with large trade surpluses. Trump addressed Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's claim of not being invited to meet, suggesting he could call him.
news.headline: Wall Street surges as US signs UK trade deal, S&P 500 up 1.3% at 5,700. US slashes UK vehicle tariffs from 25% to 10%, grants 100k-vehicle quota. UK reduces tariffs on US beef. Promises to buy $10 billion in Boeing aircraft. Trump hints at biggest tax cuts in history.

news.summary: On Thursday, U.S. stock futures saw a rise following the Federal Reserve's decision to maintain interest rates between 4.25% to 4.5%. Fed Chair Jerome Powell expressed concerns about the impact of sustained tariffs on inflation, growth, and unemployment. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.31% and the two-year bond was at 3.82%. The CME Group's FedWatch tool shows a 79.8% chance of rates remaining unchanged in June. Futures for major indices rose in premarket - Dow Jones by 0.72%, S&P 500 by 0.94%, Nasdaq 100 by 1.38%, Russell 2000 by 1.31%. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF (QQQ) also saw gains. Uber reported lower revenue in Q1, while Disney posted positive Q2 results. U.S. mortgage applications increased by 11% for the week ending May 2nd. Index performance included Nasdaq Composite at 0.27% to 17,738.16, S&P 500 at 0.43% to 5,631.28, Dow Jones at 0.70% to 41,113.97, and Russell 2000 at 0.33% to 1,989.66. Insights suggest a cautious approach to market movements.
news.headline: US stock futures rise after Fed holds interest rates steady at 4.25% to 4.5%. CME FedWatch shows 79.8% likelihood of rates staying unchanged in June. Dow Jones up 0.72%, S&P 500 up 0.94%, Nasdaq 100 up 1.38%, Russell 2000 up 1.31% in premarket on Thursday. SPY up 1.14% to $567.54, QQQ up 1.51% to $490.61. Index performance: Nasdaq +0.27% to 17,738.16, S&P 500 +0.43% to 5,631.28, Dow Jones +0.70% to 41,113.97, Russell 2000 +0.33% to 1,989.66.

news.summary: The Federal Reserve decided to maintain interest rates at 4.25%-4.5% while facing pressure for a decrease. Louis Navellier from Navellier & Associates predicted that the Fed would be one of the last central banks to cut rates but still expected four cuts this year. In contrast, the Bank of England cut rates to 4.25%, aligning with market expectations. Navellier suggested that the ongoing global rate collapse would lead to money flowing back into the US due to relatively higher rates. He also mentioned positive developments in US-China trade tensions. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Federal Reserve 'Will Be The Last To Cut' Rates, Says Expert Who Still Expects Four Cuts In 2025

news.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a significant surge on Monday, surpassing its 200-day moving average for the first time since April. This boost was fueled by improved trade relations between the U.S. and China, resulting in a 90-day truce and a reduction in triple-digit tariffs starting on May 14. The Trump administration has committed to engaging in further trade discussions with Beijing due to growing economic concerns. The Dow Jones Industrial Average, represented by the Dow Jones Industrial Average ETF (NYSE: DIA), saw a remarkable increase of 2.8%, equivalent to over 1,100 points, reaching 42,385 by mid-afternoon. This marks the second-highest performing day in the past six months, trailing only behind the 7.8% surge on April 9 following President Trump's tariff announcement.
news.headline: Dow Jones surges 2.8% with over 1,100 points gain, breaks 200-day moving average after U.S-China trade truce.

news.summary: An analyst from KeyBanc Capital Markets, Steve Barger, has raised his rating on Federal Signal Corp (NYSE: FSS) from Sector Weight to Overweight. Barger has provided a price target of $110 for FSS stock. His decision was influenced by the company's focused approach towards key competitors and ongoing initiatives to strengthen its competitive advantages. Barger highlights the potential for significant organic growth through factors like increased market share, investments in research and development, strategic pricing tactics, and the expansion of original equipment and aftermarket products offered through its service center. The analyst's positive outlook follows recent discussions with investors. Further details can be found at Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Federal Signal Corp upgraded to Overweight with $110 price forecast by KeyBanc analyst due to strategic focus & growth plans.

news.summary: In Dallas on May 14, 2025, PackageHub Business Centers®, a rapidly expanding franchise in the retail shipping sector, has revealed the addition of its 1,200th independently owned branch. The company now boasts a presence in all 50 states, solidifying its position as the second-largest player in the industry.
news.headline: PackageHub Business Centers signs 1,200th franchise store, becoming the second-largest network in the U.S.

news.summary: Perimeter Acquisition Corp. I, based in New York, has successfully closed an upsized initial public offering worth $241,500,000. The company focuses on defense-related investments.
news.headline: Perimeter Acquisition Corp. I closes upsized $241.5M IPO; raised more than initially planned.

news.summary: Plans are being made to start a Phase 1/2 clinical trial in Australia in the third quarter of 2025 using the product candidate CYWC628, which consists of fibroblast-based spheroids. This trial aims to treat diabetic foot ulcers.
news.headline: FibroBiologics reveals Q1 2025 financials, plans Phase 1/2 trial in Australia for CYWC628 to treat diabetic foot ulcers.
PMGC Holdings Inc. reports filing of Form 10-Q for the quarter.

news.summary: Fort Mill, South Carolina - On May 14, 2025, Catheter Precision, Inc. (NYSE American: VTAK) shared its financial results and operational update for the period concluding on March 31, 2025. The U.S.-based medical device company specializing in electrophysiology reported highlights from the first quarter.
news.headline: Catheter Precision, Inc. (VTAK) reports Q1 2025 financial results; innovative medical device company shows promising growth.

news.summary: Dublin and Toronto, May 14, 2025 - Global gambling giant Flutter Entertainment (NYSE: FLUT; LSE: FLTR) has officially acquired a 56% stake in NSX Group (“NSX”), a prominent Brazilian operator behind the Betnacional brand. The deal, valued at around $350 million, solidifies Flutter's position as a key player in the online sports betting and iGaming sector. This acquisition marks a significant strategic move for Flutter in expanding its reach and presence in the lucrative Brazilian market.
news.headline: Flutter completes acquisition of 56% stake in NSX Group for $350m, becoming top online sports betting operator.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in San Diego, Calidi Biotherapeutics Inc. (NYSE American: CLDI) disclosed its first-quarter 2025 operational and financial outcomes. Calidi is a forward-thinking biotech firm specializing in systemic oncolytic targeted immunotherapies that could administer genetic cargo. The company also shared key recent business achievements.
news.headline: Calidi Biotherapeutics reports Q1 2025 financial results and operational highlights, a clinical biotech firm with gene therapy.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, Eton Pharmaceuticals, Inc revealed they will attend two investor conferences. Eton, traded as ETON on the Nasdaq, is a pharmaceutical company specializing in treatments for rare diseases. The attendees include Sean Brynjelsen (CEO), James Gruber (CFO), and David Krempa (CBO). This announcement was made from Deer Park, Illinois.
news.headline: Eton Pharmaceuticals to attend upcoming investor conferences - CEO, CFO, CBO to participate. (May 14, 2025)

news.summary: Houston-based Apache Corporation, a subsidiary of APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA), has launched the application process for the Apache Corporation Tree Grant Program's upcoming 2025-2026 planting season. The program is open to applicants located within the United States.
news.headline: Apache Corp opens US applications for Tree Grant Program's 2025-2026 planting season. Applicants must be US-based.

news.summary: In Dublin, Ireland, STERIS plc (NYSE: STE) disclosed their financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year ending on March 31, 2025. During the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025, the total revenue from continuing operations rose by 4% to $1.5 billion, surpassing the $1.4 billion earned in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2024. Notably, there was a 6% growth in constant currency organic revenue from continuing operations in the same quarter.
news.headline: STERIS reports 4% revenue increase to $1.5 billion in Q4 of fiscal 2025, with 6% organic growth.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in Redwood City, California, Jasper Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: JSPR), a clinical-stage biotechnology firm, revealed plans for their novel antibody therapy, briquilimab, aimed at treating KIT to combat mast cell driven diseases including chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU), chronic inducible urticaria (CIndU), and asthma. The company shared intentions of participating in upcoming investor conferences to discuss their developments.
news.headline: Jasper Therapeutics to present at investor conferences focusing on antibody therapy for mast cell driven diseases. $JSPR.

news.summary: LOS ANGELES, today, Crescent Capital BDC, Inc. announced its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The Company reported a net investment income of $0.45 per share and net income of $0.11 per share. The net asset value (NAV) per share was $19.62 at the end of the quarter compared to $19.98 as of December 31, 2024. The stock is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CCAP.
news.headline: Crescent Capital BDC, Inc. reported Q1 2025 earnings with net investment income of $0.45 per share, net income of $0.11 per share, and NAV per share of $19.62. They declared a Q2 dividend of $0.42 per share.

news.summary: In Novato, California, on May 14, 2025, Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. (NASDAQ: RARE) unveiled its 2024 Impact Report, focusing on corporate responsibility. The report delves into the company’s initiatives to improve the lives of those dealing with rare diseases, support its workforce, and contribute positively to its operational communities. This comprehensive review encapsulates Ultragenyx's commitment to social responsibility and its dedication to creating a lasting impact.
news.headline: Ultragenyx released its 2024 Impact Report highlighting efforts in rare disease innovation and community impact.

news.summary: The significant Tether stablecoin has launched its innovative QVAC AI platform, targeting major technology corporations and enabling agents to operate autonomously. The platform allows transactions in both Bitcoin and USDT, adding diversity to its capabilities. This move signifies Tether's strategic advancement in the digital currency realm, providing new opportunities for agents to engage in transactions independently from centralized systems.
news.headline: Introducing 'QVAC': Tether's decentralized AI god brings independence, transacts in Bitcoin and USDT, challenging Big Tech.

news.summary: In Shanghai on May 14, 2025, Cango Inc. (NYSE: CANG) disclosed its unaudited financial outcomes for Q1 2025. The key figures indicate total revenues of RMB1.1 billion (US$145.2 million). The company, also known as Cango, shared its operational highlights for the quarter.
news.headline: Cango Inc. (NYSE: CANG) reports Q1 2025 revenues of RMB1.1 billion (US$145.2 million) in unaudited financial results.

news.summary: Citius Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Cranford, New Jersey, released a report on May 14, 2025. The company, also known as Citius Pharma, operates under the Nasdaq symbol CTXR. They focus on developing and bringing to market innovative critical care products. In the report, they discussed their business operations and financial status.
news.headline: Citius Pharmaceuticals, Inc. announces Q2 2025 financial results and business update; traded on Nasdaq as CTXR.

news.summary: In Montego Bay, Jamaica, on May 14, 2025, itel, the Caribbean's leading local customer experience partner, has secured a spot on the prestigious list of the top outsourcing companies worldwide, determined by the International Association of Outsourcing Professionals® (IAOP). This marks the fourth consecutive year that itel has earned this recognition.
news.headline: itel recognized on IAOP's Global Outsourcing 100® for 4th year, highlighting social impact and innovation programs.

news.summary: With the industry's highly anticipated annual conference for CIOs and IT leaders, Info-Tech Research Group gearing up, momentum is increasing as the event approaches. Info-Tech LIVE 2025 in Las Vegas in June will feature three new speakers, adding to the excitement. These newly announced speakers are set to bring fresh perspectives and insights to the event, enhancing the experience for attendees.
news.headline: Former OpenAI executive Zack has joined Info-Tech LIVE 2025 conference in Las Vegas, featuring AI, public sector, and cybersecurity leaders.
